assertions.text: Statement directly acknowledges the subject of the media inquiry without topic-avoidance
Includes a specific timeframe or commitment to update
Statement opens by naming the incident and acknowledging those affected, not with organisational positioning
Confirmed facts are clearly separated from what remains unknown
At least one concrete action is named (investigation launched, product recalled, service suspended)
Questions are phrased as a journalist would ask them, not as internal talking points
We-don't-know-yet and no-comment positions are acknowledged explicitly with bridging language
No answer contains information not grounded in the input briefing
